channel.title: Cocoon Lab Blog
channel.description: Articles and updates from Cocoon Lab about Cocoon, architectural feasibility, and responsible AI.

item.title: Cocoon at InDesCanada
item.description: Rashid Mushkani will present Cocoon at InDesCanada in Ottawa, a student-led industrial design conference, competition, and networking event.

item.title: Cocoon Lab in partnership with Mila
item.description: Why the Mila partnership matters to Cocoon Lab and how it supports Cocoon, architectural feasibility, and responsible AI product building.
